name: Evergreen Spaghetti
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat oil and butter in a large saucepan over medium heat. Add the crushed coriander seeds and cook until they release their fragrance.
2. Stir in garlic and onion; cook until softened, about 3-4 minutes.
3. Add green tomatoes and cook for an additional 3-4 minutes until they begin to soften.
4. Pour in the chicken broth (preferably homemade) and stir in herbs, salt, and a pinch of sugar. Cover and simmer gently for about 45 minutes, or until the green tomatoes are fully softened.
5. Remove from heat; blend the sauce until smooth using a blender or food processor. Return to the pan.
6. Heat just below boiling point, then stir in the cheese until melted and the sauce thickens.
7. Serve over spaghetti, garnished with sprigs of fresh basil, winter savory, and thyme.
